title: Toast Entity Health Indicator
description: This is a simple Fabric mod, that displays a toast (with health bar), that shows the health & name of the entity you are looking at.
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

<hr>

**Toast Entity Health Indicator** is a client-sided Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that displays **1** toast (with a bar), upon looking at an entity. The bar in the toast, represents the health of the targeted entity, which drains/fills smoothly (when targeted entity's health changes). The toast's title will contain the name of the targeted entity. Once you look away from the targeted entity, the toast will be on-screen for 3 seconds (bar will still be updated), before disappearing.
The whole mod is toggleable with the following command: **/toggletoastdisplay** (*now only toggleable with the default key bind H*).

For a visual of this mod, please visit this mod's **[Gallery Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/toast-entity-health-indicator/gallery)**.

<hr>

**Donation**

If you want, you can support me by donating with the link on this page.
